name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Tens of Thousands Support Trump
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-r/)
---

| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-y/)
| |
---
\- August 25 2015 -
Tens of Thousands Support Trump

| Dear Peter Willis, The people of [South Carolina](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-j/) and [New Hampshire](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-t/) have spoken. Trump leads his closest opponent by double in South Carolina - 30% to 15% and in New Hampshire a stunning 35% to 11%. And finally in our largest lead yet we garner [40% of the vote](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-i/) in a poll released today. Trump is the best choice.Last week was incredible. [Tens of thousands of supporters](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-d/) came to our Make America Great Again Rally in Mobile, Alabama. Our message is [taking hold](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-h/) all [across America](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-k/), and the polls show it. Once again, [we ](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-u/)[are on top](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-o/). The American people are demanding change - real change from the everyday politics of Washington - and Donald Trump is the only candidate with the experience and demonstrated success to make our government work for the American people. [Americans of every party](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-b/) believe that [our policies are the best](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-n/) and the only ones that can fix our nation's problems. Voters around the country are all saying the same things: [_" Trump has our best interests in mind, while other Republicans are looking out for themselves."_](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-p/) [_"Trump is saying some of the things that we talk about around the kitchen table. We need the jobs here._](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-x/) Last week Team Trump traveled to host a town hall in Derry, New Hampshire. Over 2,500 people crowded into the small auditorium to question Mr. Trump on his policies and vision for America. Our crowd was incredible - [supportive, enthusiastic, and diverse](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fthykjd-drdiuiutjh-m/). One journalist commented, _" The large and diverse crowd reflected Mr. Trump's broad appeal among Republican voters -- young and old, men and women, rich and poor."_ _
_ This week we will be bring our message to voters in Iowa, South Carolina, Massachusetts, and Tennessee. We hope you are able to join us on the trail. If you are - let us know by mentioning @RealDonaldTrump and #TeamTrump. Let's Make America Great Again!
---

Donald J. Trump

[Forward to a friend](http://donaldtrumpcampaign.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-drdiuiutjh-E524705E-fthykjd-l-z)

| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
[info@donaldtrump.com](mailto:info@donaldtrump.com)
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: 🚨🚨 Flash Critical Issues Survey. 🚨🚨
body:
LindseyGraham.com

This quick Issues Survey will only take 1 minute.

There are an incredible amount of threats and global issues
facing our country. What are the most critical issues facing our
nation?

Friend,
I want to hear from you.

I just put together this quick 6-question Flash Critical Issues
Survey, and I hope you will follow this link right now to submit
your response.

It will only take 1 minute to share your answers, and Friend,
your opinion matters greatly to me.

Please follow this link now to let me know what you think about
the issues facing our country.

Lindsey Graham

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

| | | Peter - we are just short of our end of the summer grassroots fundraising goal and we thought you'd be just the person to help! When we launched back in June, our team set the goal of recruiting over 4,000 new small dollar donors in just the summer months alone. These are donors just like you who are donating $1-100 because they know **_Governor Christie is a strong leader and the right person to move this country forward_**.
**Will you recruit 5 of your friends at $5 per person to help us meet our goal?**
* First, you can start by chipping in using **[this link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43601391:18898831907:m:1:1516426255:2AAB83F4916F7D604DF4E93D3B59A866:r)**

Every bit counts and we hope we can count on you!
Thank you, Elise Dietsch
Deputy Finance Director P.S. Don't forget to **[forward this to your friends!](https://email.vervemail.com/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=8808931&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=5ce5038333962eab80cc9231e5544d6b)**

name: John Weaver
subject: Here's why Hillary is worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, a new poll was released yesterday and it says that of all the GOP candidates, **Gov. John Kasich is the only one who can beat Hillary in New Hampshire**.

**We can win the White House and the Clintons know it**. [Can you chip in $25, $50 or more right now to make it happen?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30001215:28747932180:m:1:958431888:C69BA7F86DECE9BE2C5015F47C94E280:r)
[
](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30001215:28747932180:m:1:958431888:C69BA7F86DECE9BE2C5015F47C94E280:r)
Hillary and her team see that Gov. Kasich's record of accomplishment and optimism about the future for our great country is a message that is gaining momentum.

**[Peter, with your help, we can keep up the momentum!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30001215:28747932180:m:1:958431888:C69BA7F86DECE9BE2C5015F47C94E280:r)**

Thanks for all that you're doing.

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist

P.S. This week, former U.S. Senate Majority Leader Trent Lott and New York GOP Icon Alfonse D'Amato endorsed Gov. Kasich. [You can read more here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30001216:28747932180:m:1:958431888:C69BA7F86DECE9BE2C5015F47C94E280:r).

name: Josh Wolf
subject: BREAKING: NRSC attacking in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend --

**The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) has launched attacks against Patrick.**

A year and two months out, and the smear campaign has already begun. The NRSC is trying to tear Patrick down _right now_ **\-- and we need to fight back.**

[_**Hitting our $25,000 goal just went from "high priority" to "absolutely essential." We've only got 4 more days to do it. Rush in your contribution right now.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2021/738133e4/3ad1e9ce/7f967d90/1558253395/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150826?refcode=pme150826_m&recurring=true")

You know why these attacks are coming so early? Because the NRSC (and groups like them) are scared.

Patrick has the record to beat whichever of their hand-picked candidates comes out of the primary circus in Florida. The earlier Republicans tarnish his record, the better off they'll be.

Or at least, that's what they think. _But they 're forgetting about you, folks._

We're going to fight fire with fire here. [_**We 're going to reach our $25,000 goal in the next 4 days and fight against the attacks and smears.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2021/738133e4/3ad1e9ce/7f967d90/1558253395/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150826?refcode=pme150826_m&recurring=true") Let's show them that Team Murphy means business.

[_**Give what you can today.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2021/738133e4/3ad1e9ce/7f967d90/1558253395/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150826?refcode=pme150826_m&recurring=true")

Thanks for all the help.

Josh

Josh Wolf
Campaign Manager
Friends of Patrick Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2021/738133e4/3ad1e9ce/7f967d91/1558253395/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

name: Walt Rogers, Team Santorum
subject: We’re not taking anyone for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=1)
---
Friend --

Achieving the “Full Grassley,” named after U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley (who visits each Iowa county each year), is no small feat. Traveling across Iowa and meeting voters in each of its 99 counties is a serious commitment, and one that Rick has made and kept in 2015.

During the 2012 campaign, Rick visited each of Iowa's 99 counties, completing the “Full Grassley” in early November 2011. This campaign, he’s working even harder: his pace and commitment to Iowa voters this cycle has him two months ahead of his victorious pace of four years ago.

[**To celebrate this huge campaign milestone, we’re launching a “Full Grassley” money bomb on September 1st.** ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/full_grassley?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=2)

Unlike other candidates, Rick isn’t just chasing after TV cameras and campaigning in big cities. He’s also out campaigning in small towns and rural areas. That’s how we’re going to win this campaign — going person-by-person and taking no one for granted.

Will you help us send a message to the mainstream media that it’s the hard work at the grassroots level — not big money Super PACs — that’ll decide the outcome of this election by chipping in $9.90 or whatever you can on September 1?

[**http://www.ricksantorum.com/full_grassley**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/full_grassley?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=3)

Walt Rogers
Iowa State Director
Team Santorum

[ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=4)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=5).
You can also keep up with Team Santorum on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FTeamSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=6) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FTeamSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1010&n=7).

name: Yvette Lewis
subject: Ted Cruz and another shutdown?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Ninety-five years ago, women finally won the right to vote. Today, we mark this anniversary by celebrating the great strides made by the courageous women who came before us to take up this struggle and other fights for greater equality in our country. Without them we wouldn't be where we are today supporting leaders like Chris who will push tirelessly for equal pay, access to quality childcare and paid parental leave.

But just this week, we saw a crucial reminder that Republicans haven't given up their war on women. On Monday the Washington Post reported that Ted Cruz will launch a 50-state campaign against Planned Parenthood, **and even worse, he 's willing to shut down the federal government if Planned Parenthood is allowed to continue providing health care services.**

We've seen this circus before. When I was the Chair of the Maryland Democratic Party, Ted Cruz shut down the government over the Affordable Care Act -- luckily, we knew exactly who would step up to lead us against those right-wing attacks: Chris Van Hollen.

**Chris led the fight on the House floor against shutting down the government then - and he's ready to lead that fight again now.**

[**Our next U.S. Senator is determined to fight back. Stand with Chris and demand that Ted Cruz and Republicans stop their attacks on women 's health.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f48/70cdc2ba/47a6eae7/39518ce/3739897638/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-republicans-stop-their-attack-on-women-s-rights?source=em082615&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Our+next+US+Senator+is+determined+to+fig&utm_campaign=em082615") [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f48/70cdc2ba/47a6eae7/39518df/3739897638/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-republicans-stop-their-attack-on-women-s-rights?source=em082615&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em082615") Republicans may be ready to roll back women's rights and strip millions of their access to critical health care - but Chris is not going to stand by and let it happen.

[**Please add your voice today - Tell Ted Cruz and the Republicans: ENOUGH! Stop your cynical attacks on women's health and your schemes to undermine our government.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f48/70cdc2ba/47a6eae7/39518db/3739897638/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-republicans-stop-their-attack-on-women-s-rights?source=em082615&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+add+your+voice+today+ndash+Tell+T&utm_campaign=em082615")

You and I know that with an effective ally like Chris Van Hollen, we can fight back and make a real difference. That's what we're aiming for, and it's why we won't let up.

Yvette Lewis
Co-Chair, Van Hollen for Senate
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f48/70cdc2ba/47a6eae7/39518d3/3739897638/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em082615&source=em082615") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
clean_body: Friend, Ninety-five years ago, women finally won the right to vote. Today, we mark this anniversary by celebrating the great strides made by the courageous women who came before us to take up this struggle and other fights for greater equality in our country. Without them we wouldn't be where we are today supporting leaders like Chris who will push tirelessly for equal pay, access to quality childcare and paid parental leave. But just this week, we saw a crucial reminder that Republicans haven't given up their war on women. On Monday the Washington Post reported that Ted Cruz will launch a 50-state campaign against Planned Parenthood, and even worse, he 's willing to shut down the federal government if Planned Parenthood is allowed to continue providing health care services. We've seen this circus before. When I was the Chair of the Maryland Democratic Party, Ted Cruz shut down the government over the Affordable Care Act -- luckily, we knew exactly who would step up to lead us against those right-wing attacks: Chris Van Hollen. Chris led the fight on the House floor against shutting down the government then - and he's ready to lead that fight again now. "" "" Republicans may be ready to roll back women's rights and strip millions of their access to critical health care - but Chris is not going to stand by and let it happen. "" You and I know that with an effective ally like Chris Van Hollen, we can fight back and make a real difference. That's what we're aiming for, and it's why we won't let up. Yvette Lewis Co-Chair, Van Hollen for Senate | Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Fwd: BREAKING: NRSC attacking in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend -- I just wanted to make sure you saw this message from Josh.

We're in a top ten Senate race. These attacks are going to come early and often.

[**Help us fight back against the NRSC 's latest smear by reaching our August goal of $25,000 before Monday's deadline. Give today.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d8/738133e4/3ad69b72/7f966ab1/4140864997/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150827am?refcode=pme150827am_m&recurring=true")

Thank you.

Patrick

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Josh Wolf
Date: Tue, Aug 25, 2015
Subject: BREAKING: NRSC attacking in Florida
| [](www.murphyforflorida.com)
---

Friend --

_The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) has launched attacks against Patrick._

A year and two months out, and the smear campaign has already begun. The NRSC is trying to tear Patrick down _right now_ \-- **and we need to fight back.**

[**Hitting our $25,000 goal just went from "high priority" to "absolutely essential." We've only got 5 more days to do it. Rush in your contribution right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d8/738133e4/3ad69b72/7f966ab1/4140864997/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150827am?refcode=pme150827am_m&recurring=true")

You know why these attacks are coming so early? Because the NRSC (and groups like them) are scared.

Patrick has the record to beat whichever of their hand-picked candidates comes out of the primary circus in Florida. The earlier Republicans tarnish his record, the better off they'll be.

Or at least, that's what they think. _But they 're forgetting about you, folks._

We're going to fight fire with fire here. [**We 're going to reach our $25,000 goal in the next 5 days and fight against the attacks and smears.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d8/738133e4/3ad69b72/7f966ab1/4140864997/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150827am?refcode=pme150827am_m&recurring=true") Let's show them that Team Murphy means business.

[**Give what you can today.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d8/738133e4/3ad69b72/7f966ab1/4140864997/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150827am?refcode=pme150827am_m&recurring=true")

Thanks for all the help.

Josh

Josh Wolf
Campaign Manager
Friends of Patrick Murphy

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d8/738133e4/3ad69b72/7f966ab2/4140864997/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20d8/738133e4/3ad69b72/7f966ab3/4140864997/VEsA/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Help us end this month strong. | Friend --

The seventeen Republican candidates for president have attacked me and this team every single day, all summer long.

You've seen it on TV and read it in the papers -- they're trying to make a little news by smearing my name.

The closer we get to the primary, the worse it's going to get. **[I need you with me in this fight.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjMzNjE5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNTgwNTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

There are serious issues at stake in this election. Working families need a raise, women deserve equal pay, students need more access to affordable, higher education.

We're on the right side of this, and our opponents know it. So while the other side tries to muddy the conversation and drag us down, we'll keep growing an organization that can withstand attacks and advocate for everyday Americans.

**But I can 't fight back without you. We've set a goal of 20,000 grassroots donations by the end of the month. Chip in $****1****or more before then if you 're with me:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/august-deadline/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjMzNjE5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNTgwNTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you,

Hillary

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjMzNjE5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNTgwNTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMzNjE5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNTgwNTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMzNjE5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNTgwNTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMzNjE5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNTgwNTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMzNjE5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNTgwNTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMzNjE5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNTgwNTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMzNjE5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIyNTgwNTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
